name: SbcIdsProdQhpExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: SELECT BNF.PROD_ID, BNF.EFF_DT, BNF.TERM_DT, BNF.PCKG_ID, BNF.BNF_OPT_ID, BNF.CHLD_HLTH_SVC_IN, BNF.DMSTC_PRTNR_IN, BNF.ELCTV_ABRTN_IN, BNF.EXMPT_WMN_PREVNTV_IN, BNF.GRFTHRED_IN, BNF.HYBRID_IN, BNF.NON_ERISA_IN, BNF.NOT_CUR_IN, BNF.PRI_AGE_SEX_IN, BNF.SPCH_AND_HRNG_IN, BNF.RNWL_MO_NO, BNF.PLN_ID, BNF.ST_CD, BNF.HSA_OPT_TX, BNF.PBDL_TX, BNF.NTWK_SET_TX, BNF.CMNT_TX, BNF.PROD_TX, UPDT.LAST_UPDT_DT, BNF.LAST_UPDT_USER_ID, BNF.QHP_ID FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_SBCOwner}.[BNF_OPT_XREF] BNF,(SELECT PROD_ID, QHP_ID, max(LAST_UPDT_DT) LAST_UPDT_DT FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_SBCOwner}.[BNF_OPT_XREF] WHERE EFF_DT <> TERM_DT GROUP BY PROD_ID, QHP_ID) UPDT WHERE BNF.PROD_ID = UPDT.PROD_ID AND BNF.QHP_ID = UPDT.QHP_ID AND BNF.QHP_ID IS NOT NULL AND BNF.QHP_ID NOT IN ('0', '', ' ', 'NA', 'UNK', 'N/A00') AND BNF.EFF_DT <> BNF.TERM_DT

Description:
Called By: SbcIdsProdQhpExtCntl

Process Description: Extract Data from SBC (BNF_OPT_XREF) and Load it to IDS (PROD_QHP)
